name: PuttTracker
short: Track putt.day scores with weekly and overall leaderboards.
description: Parses putt.day score posts from Discord messages and maintains weekly and all-time leaderboards. Auto-detects scores, dedupes by day number, and shows rankings sorted by average relative to par.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs and putt.day scores (strokes, par, relative). No other personal data is collected.
install_msg: PuttTracker loaded. Post a putt.day score and the bot will track it automatically. Use `[p]putt weekly` and `[p]putt overall` to see leaderboards.
